findings.description: s2 contains only a navigation cross-reference (`:ref:`記載しているサンプルプログラムソースコードの注意事項 <sourceCode>` 参照`) with no substantive technical content. Per validation guidelines, navigation-only cross-references are acceptable omissions and do not warrant a dedicated section. The source contains this note twice (once after each main section), yet only one occurrence is captured as s2 — the second occurrence at the end of the 正常な画面遷移 section is absent from s3.
findings.source_evidence: Source ends section 1 and section 2 both with: `(\ :ref:\`記載しているサンプルプログラムソースコードの注意事項 <sourceCode>\`\ 参照)`
